display.name: dbinstance_identifier
display.description: This is the unique key that identifies a DB instance

spec.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'dbinstance_identifier') as dbinstance_identifier
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name like 'aws_rds_database_connections_average'
GROUP BY dbinstance_identifier

display.name: EBSIOBalance%
display.description: The percentage of I/O credits remaining in the burst bucket of your RDS database.

display.name: FreeStorageSpace
display.description: The amount of available storage space.

display.name: DiskQueueDepth
display.description: The number of outstanding I/Os (read/write requests) waiting to access the disk.

display.name: DatabaseConnections
display.description: The number of client network connections to the database instance.

display.name: EBSByteBalance%
display.description: The percentage of throughput credits remaining in the burst bucket of your RDS database.

display.name: FreeableMemory
display.description: The amount of available random access memory. This metric reports the value of the MemAvailable field of /proc/meminfo
